insights.claim: Acme offers an annual discount for its enterprise plan
insights.evidence: Introduced annual discount for enterprise plan
Added CTA for custom pricing demo

insights.claim: Acme positions itself as an automation-first solution
Acme's workflow builder integrates with Salesforce
insights.evidence: Added Salesforce integration to workflow builder page

recommendations.title: Pricing Strategy Adjustment
recommendations.rationale: Acme's pricing strategy includes annual discounts for enterprise plans and custom pricing demos, indicating a focus on attracting and retaining large customers. To remain competitive, we should consider similar pricing strategies.
actions: Introduce annual discounts for our enterprise plan
Develop a custom pricing demo option for potential customers

recommendations.title: Automation-First Messaging
recommendations.rationale: Acme positions itself as an automation-first solution, highlighting the importance of automation in its messaging. We should consider emphasizing automation capabilities in our own messaging to appeal to customers looking for efficient solutions.
actions: Review and adjust our messaging to emphasize automation capabilities
Develop content highlighting the benefits of automation in our solution

recommendations.title: Integration with Key Platforms
recommendations.rationale: Acme's workflow builder integrates with Salesforce, demonstrating the importance of integrating with key platforms. We should consider developing similar integrations to enhance our solution's appeal.
actions: Develop an integration with Salesforce for our workflow builder
Research and prioritize integrations with other key platforms
